Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user asks You have just heard the long detailed explanation above from an interviewee describing their property onboarding process Your goal is to ask the interviewee a series of questions to clarify and improve your understanding of their process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to generate a list of targeted open ended questions that the interviewer could ask the interviewee to clarify the property onboarding process

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Key aspects documentation verification data entry property manager assignment criteria introductory meeting expectations scheduling photographer and inspector inspection issue resolution marketing creation activation in portal tenant screening lease finalization quality checks and internal audits exception handling special insurance custom lease clauses communication flow and tracking

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We should ask about details missing eg what are the exact criteria for assigning property manager How are workload and specialization balanced What is the timeline for each step Who is responsible for contacting the landlord for missing documents How are the property details recorded What is the role of the regional office What does the digital marketing team base pricing models on How are promotional discounts decided How are multiple interested tenants handled Who negotiates lease terms What happens if inspection reveals major issues How is the decision made to postpone activation How is the compliance officer involved What are the internal audit criteria What are the typical exceptions and how are they escalated How is communication tracked Are there any SLAs What technologies are used Not ask for SQL but ask about tools processes and data flow

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus the answer will be a list of open ended questions grouped perhaps by categories Documentation Data Capture Property Manager Assignment Introductory Meeting Inspection and Repairs Marketing and Pricing Tenant Screening and Selection Lease Finalization Quality Assurance and Compliance Exception Handling Communication and Tracking Timing and SLAs External Stakeholders

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must ensure the questions are open ended and not leading The user wants a list of targeted open ended questions

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Make sure not to request any SQL or implementation specifics Just conceptual

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We could include about communication internal CRM usage project management tools tracking And about exceptions special insurance custom lease clauses

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We should also ask about stakeholder responsibilities who does what at each step Eg Who schedules photographer and inspector Who decides on repair contractors Who approves marketing materials Who performs tenant screening Who makes final lease decision Who does compliance review Who does financial analysis Who performs IT checks

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Also about escalation what happens if issues arise at any stage who resolves them what is the process

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Also about timeline what are typical durations for each step any SLA

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Also about handoffs how are tasks transferred between teams any sign offs

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Also about risk any compliance risks fair housing data privacy
